rationale: Voss et al. (2003) is cited at a specific methodological step in the MBP/FBP scale construction rather than as general background. The citing paper explicitly uses it to justify an iterative item-reduction approach based on CFA model comparisons and chi-square difference testing. This indicates direct procedural borrowing for measurement development, even though the focal constructs are different.
relation_description: The citing paper applies the scale-reduction procedure from Voss et al. (2003) in Study 1, using full-versus-reduced CFA comparisons and chi-square difference tests to trim items. It transfers that method to the development of a masculine/feminine brand personality scale.
